$schema_doc: Source-of-truth config for all 18 launchd cron jobs. Edit this file then run `node launchd/generate-plists.js` to regenerate launchd/plists/*.plist. Each entry produces one .plist file. The 'schedule' field accepts either { interval: <seconds> } for StartInterval or { calendar: { Hour, Minute, Weekday? } } for StartCalendarInterval. Weekday: 0=Sun, 1=Mon, ..., 6=Sat. All clock times are in the Mac's local timezone (set the Mac to America/Sao_Paulo so cadences match Brazilian agro hours).

jobs.name: sync-market-data
jobs.description: BCB SGS commodity prices + macro indicators
jobs.comment: Every 30min — BCB SGS refreshes during BCB business hours (Brazil)

jobs.name: sync-agro-news
jobs.comment: Every 2h — fresher than the old daily Vercel run

jobs.name: sync-recuperacao-judicial
jobs.description: Legal RSS for agro RJ filings

jobs.name: sync-prices-na
jobs.comment: Every 1h — currently a stub, doesn't persist

jobs.name: sync-faostat-livestock
jobs.comment: Daily 02:30 local — closes the boi-gordo gap

jobs.name: sync-mdic-comexstat
jobs.description: MDIC ComexStat — Brazilian agro export volumes/values

jobs.name: sync-key-agro-laws
jobs.description: Curated key agro laws (CPR / Falências / Nova Lei do Agro)

jobs.name: sync-worldbank-prices
jobs.description: World Bank Pink Sheet annual prices

jobs.name: sync-usda-psd
jobs.description: USDA PSD crop supply/demand (oilseeds + grains + cotton)
jobs.comment: Sunday 09:30 local — large CSV ZIPs, weekly is enough

jobs.name: sync-conab-safra
jobs.description: CONAB Série Histórica de Safras (Brazil grain production)
jobs.comment: Daily 01:30 local — CONAB updates monthly but cheap to re-fetch

jobs.name: sync-source-registry-healthcheck
jobs.comment: Sunday 10:00 local — flags newly broken sources in activity_log
